# Memory Record Template

```md
---
id: mem_YYYYMMDD_shortid
slug: lower-kebab-case-title
type: concept|decision|project|preference|profile|worklog
title: ""
confidence: high|medium|low
source_episodes:
  - al_YYYYMMDD_001
verified: true
created: YYYY-MM-DD
updated: YYYY-MM-DD
links: []
---

## Summary

One sentence summary.

## Facts

- Verified facts only.

## Updates

- YYYY-MM-DD: Initial entry.

## Gaps

- Unknowns or future checks.

## Sources

- `.aideloop/episodes/al_YYYYMMDD_001/`
```
